{{Quote|"We were so focused on perfecting the advanced sensor analysis of the XPLR-R, that we simply ignored our needs in corporate defense," said former VSIS president Rina Fio after her release by Arakyd forces. "Obviously that was a big mistake. We're pleased that under our new management that Viper will have the backing of the Techno Union military forces."|Rina Fio, in a comment to the HoloNet News|<ref name="Sensor Technology Dispute Settled in Takeover" />}}
'''Rina Fio''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] individual who was president of [[Viper Sensor Intelligence Systems]].<ref name="Sensor Technology Dispute Settled in Takeover" /> Shortly before the outbreak of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] in the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]],<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|I|4|AAD-4}}</ref> she was ousted when [[Arakyd Industries/Legends|Arakyd Industries]] took over VSIS following an 18-[[Standard month/Legends|month]]-long between the two companies. After being released by Arakyd forces, she commented to the [[HoloNet News/Legends|HoloNet News]] that VSIS was pleased that under its new management it would have the backing of the [[Techno Union/Legends|Techno Union]] [[Techno Union Droid Army/Legends|military forces]].<ref name="Sensor Technology Dispute Settled in Takeover" />

==Behind the scenes==
Rina Fio was originally created for ''[[HoloNet News Vol. 531 50]]'', a [[HoloNet News (original website)|HoloNet News]] article written by [[Pablo Hidalgo]] and [[Paul Ens]] with illustrations by [[Joe Corroney]] and released on [[April 4]], [[2002]].<ref name="Sensor Technology Dispute Settled in Takeover" />
